title: schmidtottia cubensis subsp. cristalensis
intro: Schmidtottia cubensis subsp. cristalensis, commonly known as Cristalensis, is a plant species found in Cuba. As a medicinal plant, it has been traditionally used to treat various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and respiratory issues. Its therapeutic actions include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antifungal properties, which contribute to its potential health benefits, such as reducing pain and inflammation, and fighting off infections. The bioactive constituents of Cristalensis include flavonoids, alkaloids, and terpenoids, which are responsible for its therapeutic effects.
